steps.title: Identify the subject and verb needed
steps.content: The subject is Anthropologist Livia Barbosa, a singular third‑person noun phrase, and the blank expects the main verb that follows it.

steps.title: Apply subject‑verb agreement
steps.content:
The rule is subject‑verb agreement: a singular subject takes a singular present‑tense verb.
Choice C studies matches the singular subject Anthropologist Livia Barbosa.
The other three either use a plural form or a plural verb construction, violating agreement.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
